summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Romanian SEO Automation landing page. All 15 specified features are working perfectly including navbar, hero section, stats, features, how it works, benefits, integrations, pricing, testimonials, FAQ, footer CTA, footer, navigation, mobile responsiveness, and dark theme with green accents.
passed_tests: Navbar renders with logo, nav links (Funcționalități, Cum Funcționează, Prețuri, Testimoniale, FAQ), Autentificare, and Începe Gratuit CTA
Hero section shows badge '7 zile gratuit', headline, subtitle, two CTA buttons, and 3 trust badges
Features section shows 12 feature cards with icons and descriptions
How It Works section shows 3 steps
Pricing section shows 3 plans (Starter €19, Pro €49, Agency €99) with Pro marked as popular
Testimonials section shows 3 testimonial cards with star ratings
FAQ section shows 7 FAQ items that expand/collapse on click
Footer CTA section with 'Începe Trial Gratuit de 7 Zile' button
Navigation links scroll to correct sections (smooth scroll)
Mobile responsive - hamburger menu appears on small screens
Dark theme with green accent colors throughout
